titleStmt.title: SII 5, appendix, no. 51: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 51. (A.R. No. 51 of 1888). ON THE BASE OF THE BACK OF THE SAME GOPURA, RIGHT SIDE. No. 121 of South-Indian Inscriptions, Vol. I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍale curaṉ [harirāyavibhā]ṭan pā ṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūṟuvatekṣaṇa paścima[ Uttara] samutrā tipati śrīvirappiṟatāpa viranarasiṁha teva kṛṣṇatevamā hārā yar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śakāptam
1000 4 100 3 10 5- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa śrīmukhasamvatsara ttu siṁ hanā yum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa Irevatinakṣatra ttu nāḷ tiruviriñcipuram Uṭaiyār vaḻittuṇaināyiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattār vaṇṭuvarāpatināṭṭu tiruviriñcipuram kopālaceṭṭiyaḷil Eḻumpokkakoṉ paccaināyaṉ kāṅkaiya kaccipperumāḷceṭṭiyā
pparcoḻakkoṉ māḷ kāraka ṇṭāṉ kopāla� ḷukkum tiruccāntu Upayam kuṭuttapaṭi Uṭaiyār ṇainayiṉār tirunāḷ na kkum Iṉimel varukiṟa nāḷukkum tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku kaṭṭaḷai Ēḻāntirunāḷukku tiruccāntu mukkaḻañcum Oṉpatāntiru
nā ḻu kaḻañcum tirunāḷukku Upaiyam mukkuṟuṇi Amutupaṭiyum tirunāḷ tirunāḷtoṟum Immaricāti canti ttivarakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Itukku Iyātoruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ gaṅ kaikkaraiyil kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭa
Ippaṭikku śrīman tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sa paiyom śvararakṣai Ivai tekṣiṇāmūr tti bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai pālaṉukku Iṟaṅkiṉanampi Eḻuttu Ivai periyanā Eḻuttu Ivai tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai caivātirāyar Eḻuttu Ivai vaḻittuṇainampi Eḻuttu
Ivai taḻuvakkuḻaintāmpaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai māṟkasahā yapaṭṭar pa Aracapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai Apparāṉpaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai camaiyamantiri Eḻuttu Ivai koyilkaṇakku maṇimaṅkalamuṭaiyār Aṇaḷacci Eḻuttu Ivai koyilkaṇakku perumpūtūruṭaiyār ciṅkaḷarāyar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5, appendix, no. 51 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
